classObjective: Solve linear equations that have the variable on both sides of the equation, including those with fractions and grouping symbols.
workedExamples: 2-4, Example 1 — Solve Equations with Variables on Both Sides
2-4, Example 2 — Write and Solve Equations from Word Problems
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: collecting variable terms; distributive property application; fraction clearing
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice solving equations with variables on both sides, including fractions and grouping symbols
independentPractice: Practice problems solving linear equations with variables on both sides
assessment: Exit ticket: solve an equation with variables on both sides and fractions
capReflection: What is the first step when you see variables on both sides of an equation?
